name: Kirby–Paris / Goodstein — Proof Graph (frontier)
description: Companion axiomatic charts: "Peano & Paris — Part 10: Goodstein & Kirby–Paris Indicators" in the main database.
mermaid:
flowchart TD
  TG["Target: Goodstein theorem is independent of PA yet true in N"] --> HG["Given: Goodstein game on hereditary base-k numerals"]
  HG --> AG["Assertion: every Goodstein sequence reaches zero"]
  AG --> BG["Construction: hereditary base-k expansion at each stage"]
  BG --> SG["Algorithm capsule: reweight bases subtract one and rewrite"]
  SG --> OG["Construction: attach countable ordinal below epsilon zero to each term"]
  OG --> WG["Lemma: each Goodstein step strictly lowers the ordinal"]
  WG --> TG0["Assertion: well-founded descent forces termination in strong systems"]
  TG0 --> MG["Inference: meta-level Kirby-Paris show this termination is not PA-provable"]
  MG --> CG["Conclusion: independence of Goodstein from PA"]
